title: The Lion & The Statve
content:
On a Statue--king Lion dethroned,
    Showing conqueror Man,--Lion frowned.
    "If a Lion, you know,
    Had been sculptor, he'd show
    Lion rampant, and Man on the ground."

    The Story Depends On The Teller
meaning:
Walter Crane's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Lion & The Statve"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
